## Dataset Title

## Public Landing Page

ModelScope / Kaggle / Zenodo / institutional URL:

## Flow Configuration

Example: droplet breakup in homogeneous isotropic turbulence.

## Data Type and Format

Example: EnSight Gold, HDF5, Zarr, VTK, NPZ, solver-specific binary.

## Variables

List variables, units, shape, field location, and phase convention.

## Grid and Coordinates

Describe grid type, dimensions, coordinate order, bounds, and geometry files.

## Citation and License

Provide DOI, related paper, preferred citation, and license.

## Loading Instructions

Explain how an external user can read one sample or snapshot.

## Preview Figure

Attach or link one representative image.
